name: Fish Escabeche
recipeIngredient: flour with salt - for dredging fish
salt and freshly ground pepper - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish with lemon juice. Rinse.
2. Season filets with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge in flour mixed with salt and deep fry in hot oil until golden brown.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (including olive oil) to a pan. When hot, add the vegetables and cook until the onions are soft.
5. Pour in the vinegar, water, and remaining ingredients (taste), bring to a boil, and pour boiling liquid over the fish.
6. Allow to cool at least 24 hours before serving.
